name: Chicken Beer Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the chicken with flour, season with salt and pepper, and brown lightly in cooking oil on both sides.
2. Place the browned chicken breasts in a Dutch oven or casserole dish.
3. Mix together the soup, soy sauce, 2 tablespoons almonds, mushrooms, and beer.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour uncovered.
6. Sprinkle the remaining tablespoon of almonds over the chicken just before serving.
7. Serve with fried rice and juicy cling peaches warmed in the oven.
